title: A flight controller had visual contact with a UFO over Londrina Airport [2013]
excerpt: MAY 6th, 2013. text_preview:
MAY 6th, 2013. A flight controller at the Londrina Airport, Paraná, from 6:36 pm to 6:41 pm, observed an unidentified flying object shaped like an amber yellow light, whose horizontal movement made him think it was an airplane. The witness reported that the object was headed south-east, but did not emit a sound or leave a trail or smoke behind.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SIAN). Fundo ‘Objeto Voador Não Identificado (OVNI)’. Código de Referência BR DFANBSB ARX.0.0.717. “Questionário sobre ocorrência de objeto voador não identificado (ovni) em Lon
summary: A flight controller at Londrina Airport visually tracked an amber-yellow light UFO for 5 minutes heading southeast with no sound or trail.
